name: NEPHROGENIC ADENOMA
definition: uncommon benign metaplastic response to urothelial injury / prolonged irritation

demographics.Age: 3 weeks to 83 years; M÷F = 3÷1 (more common in females if < 20 years of age)
demographics.Path: discrete raised papillary / polypoid / cystic areas projecting from epithelial surface
demographics.Histo: variable number of small tubules (resembling loops of Henle and collecting ducts) +
demographics.Size: usually 1 mm, up to 7 cm in diameter

clinical.Prognosis: high likelihood of recurrence; rarely malignant transformation
